title: Relay Run: Fuel-Budgeted Interstellar Survey
strategies: fuel-blind nearest hop: from the starbase always jump to the nearest unvisited system that still fits fuel, ignoring science value (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference, scores ~0.1)

value-density insertion greedy: repeatedly cheapest-insert the unvisited system with the best prize-per-extra-fuel while it fits the budget, never revising, so early placements that block a better ordering leave value stranded

warm-started local search: seed from the insertion greedy, then alternate 2-opt route shortening, cheapest-insertion of newly affordable systems, and drop-and-swap of cheap systems for richer reachable ones, reclaiming value one-shot greedy strands while the visit-everything ceiling stays unaffordable (headroom < 1.0)
invalid over-budget route: visit every system so the flown path blows the fuel budget and the route is rejected -> 0.0
